temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dimly lit, narrow alley at night, a person's hands are seen lighting a charcoal stove with a lighter. The stove is made of metal and sits on a patterned tile floor. The scene then cuts to a man with long, dark, curly hair, seen from behind, walking down a blurry, neon-lit street. (Storyline: The scene establishes a gritty, urban setting and introduces a mysterious character, setting a tense and mysterious mood.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Neutral, informative. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of a lighter clicking, followed by the ambient noise of a busy street.)
(00:04-00:09) The man with long hair continues walking down the street, passing by various storefronts and neon signs. The camera follows him from behind, keeping his identity obscured. The street is wet, reflecting the colorful lights. (Storyline: The protagonist is shown moving through the city, suggesting he is on a mission or heading towards a destination.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Ambient city sounds and a low, tense musical score begins to build.)
